programs.title: Customer Wars
programs.desc: At a Texas superstore, a customer gets irate after an employee asks to check her receipt before she leaves. In Florida, a man allegedly attacks a couple in a restaurant... and a server who joins the brawl may know more than she admits. A simple trip to the store turns into a heated confrontation in a Michigan parking lot when one customer accuses another of illegally parking in a handicap space. In Thailand, a soccer player for a local team who refuses to pay his bar tab is confronted.

programs.title: Customer Wars
programs.desc: On a flight in Florida, passengers turn on a woman who rushes to the front of the line waiting to deboard. In Punta Gorda, Florida, a fishing dispute explodes when an enraged captain boards another boater's vessel. In San Francisco, California, a couple denied service erupts inside a restaurant and has to be removed as the chaos spills into the street. In Englewood, Colorado, a late-night diner becomes a battleground when a dispute between tables ignites a massive brawl.

programs.title: Customer Wars
programs.desc: At a Key Largo resort, officers are called to handle a couple who are allegedly causing a disturbance; at an airport in Florida, TSA agents attempt to stop a passenger who's acting erratically at a security checkpoint.

programs.title: Customer Wars
programs.desc: At a Dallas airport, confusion over seating on a plane ends with police intervention; a dispute over boat parking in Montgomery, Ala., leads to a huge brawl on the docks; a rideshare passenger in Chicago takes issue with a driver's dashcam.

programs.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programs.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programs.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programs.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.
